request: Prove the on-device c-bootstrap/fkwu/kernel form-cli based app with Metal native execution, no Rust/Go/Python/shell/clang runtime dependencies, direct or proxy cell/oracle channels, and end-to-end receipts.
summary: Standalone fkwu form-cli runtime, deterministic app verbs, macOS native object execution, Android ELF shared-library execution, and a standalone post-build Metal GQA llama block runtime boundary were proven locally. Full form-llama inference/training inside fkwu/form-cli, live standalone form-cli ask over local Ollama, Windows physical runtime, and proxy-cell frontier oracle routing remain unproven.

native local ask is socket-based; frontier oracle paths still use host-exec or Python/API subprocess lanes, not a strict proxy cell

proofs_failed_or_partial.name: standalone fkwu form-cli live local-oracle ask
commands: printf 'ask Reply with exactly FORM-CLI-ASK-OK.\nquit\n' | env -i HOME=$HOME PATH=/no-tools .cache/fkwu-form-cli-e2e/form-cli
curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"form-llama","prompt":"Reply with exactly FORM-CLI-ASK-OK.","stream":false}'
proofs_failed_or_partial.observed: direct curl to Ollama returned JSON with FORM-CLI-ASK-OK; standalone fkwu form-cli returned '[ask: no answer from local oracle - is ollama running at 127.0.0.1:11434?]' and, after native sock_request fallback, appended 'cell'. Ollama logs showed POST /api/generate hits during fallback, so transport reaches the server but the app does not yet lift the response field.
proofs_failed_or_partial.boundary: external loopback HTTP response extraction/fallback behavior in standalone fkwu app

proofs_failed_or_partial.name: full form-llama Form-native runtime
proofs_failed_or_partial.observed: Metal GQA/llama block bricks and on-device Ollama/MLX carrier are proven separately; content-addressed model cells, Form-native inference/training, real GGUF weights, tokenizer, multi-layer decode, and generation inside fkwu/form-cli are not proven.

proofs_failed_or_partial.name: frontier model agent CLI as strict proxy cell
proofs_failed_or_partial.observed: ask+ and tiered runners still use host-exec or Python/API subprocess lanes for remote frontier access; no strict fkwu app proxy-cell oracle receipt exists.

proofs_failed_or_partial.name: Windows physical runtime
proofs_failed_or_partial.observed: PE/COFF x64+arm64 object floor passed four-way; no physical Windows runtime was run in this session.
